cases.name: category_update_atomic_reindex
cases.expected: category row, localized translation, and Blog-scope ReindexRequested outbox record commit in one transaction

cases.name: category_delete_atomic_reindex
cases.expected: category deletion and Blog-scope ReindexRequested outbox record commit together; failed deletion publishes no event

cases.name: tenant_scoped_translations
cases.expected: category translation reads, updates, and deletes are constrained by tenant_id and category_id

cases.name: mounted_http_write_path
cases.expected: Blog category HTTP mutations construct CategoryService with TransactionalEventBus from HostRuntimeContext

cases.name: bounded_category_list
cases.expected: HTTP category pagination normalizes page to at least one and per_page to the range 1..100

cases.name: search_payload_dependency
cases.expected: Blog search documents project category_name and category_slug, so category changes require Blog-scope rebuild

runtime_promotion_requirements: execute category create/update/delete HTTP requests with real RBAC
verify one outbox record is committed for category update and delete
verify an outbox write failure rolls back the category mutation
run Search ingestion and confirm category_name/category_slug change in related Blog documents
verify cross-tenant category IDs and translations cannot be read or mutated
